name: IT Team
description: A complete IT team with agents for marketing, product, development, testing, and operations — each merged from the best specialists across the ClawShell ecosystem.

agents.name: 市场
agents.description: Crafts the story, spreads it everywhere, drives organic growth through SEO, and finds untapped channels to scale.

agents.name: 产品
agents.description: Synthesizes user feedback, prioritizes with data, spots trends, and drives measurable outcomes from idea to impact.

agents.name: 开发
agents.description: Designs workflows, orchestrates the dev pipeline, builds integration tools, and ships with discipline from spec to production.

agents.name: 测试
agents.description: Tests APIs, benchmarks performance, analyzes results, and requires overwhelming evidence before approving production readiness.

agents.name: 运营
agents.description: Converts specs into action, coordinates cross-functional delivery, optimizes daily processes, and turns data into decisions.
